name: Real-Time Grounding
description: Ability to access and cite current information beyond training cutoff via web search, live APIs, or retrieval tools. Prevents hallucination on time-sensitive facts.

transferArtifact.systemPromptBlueprint:
You have access to a web search tool. Use it when:
- The question involves events after [KNOWLEDGE_CUTOFF]
- The user asks for current prices, news, or status
- You are not confident the information is still accurate
Always cite your sources with the URL.
transferArtifact.notes: Requires a connected search tool (MCP server or function call). The essence itself is the tool-use pattern, not the data.
